entries.speaker: cordwyn
lines: They've been mobilizing for weeks. The betrayal
wasn't a signal — it was a distraction. While we watched Cael
run, they marched.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: How long do we have?

entries.speaker: cordwyn
lines: The Ram hits the eastern wall within the hour.
We need everyone on the battlements.

entries.speaker: caden
lines: We came. The spirits said to hurry.

entries.speaker: cordwyn
lines: We hold with what we have.

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: I was a poor king. I know that. But I will not
be a poor man.

entries.speaker: edren
lines: Your Majesty—

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: Edren. The crown... was always too heavy. You
understand that now. Protect... what's left.

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: The Forgewright... Maren was right. The ley
lines... should have listened...

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: Maren. I should have listened. When you told
me... about the door...

entries.speaker: maren
lines: I know, Your Majesty.

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: Don't let it... open further...

entries.speaker: king_aldren
lines: Protect... what's left.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines: You are doing wonderfully. Truly. I have not been
this entertained in centuries.

entries.speaker: vaelith
lines: Rest now. You'll need your strength. The real work
hasn't started yet.
*Everything the party built — every alliance, every trust, every
plan — burns. The king is dead. The friend is gone. The artifact
is in the hands of something that wears a familiar face. And the
Pendulum, wherever it is now, is closer to the door than ever.*
